creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Apparently when emulators/virtualbox-ose is updated that is sufficient context for virtualbox-ose-additions to also be updated. (I came up without another reason to update my ports vintage via svnlite. Afterwards emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions built fine.)

In other words: my originally looking up to see if emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions had an update was inappropriate because of an indirection to another port that I was not explicitly building or directly interested in.

I still would suggest UPDATING notes for either or both of ports and 11.0-CURRENT relative to virtualbox, including virtualbox-ose-additions.
